name: Siddharth Verma
summary: Siddharth outlines how his regular physical training, swimming, and basic maritime knowledge helped him perform well in the Bhopal Board.
data: I opted for the Navy wing in NDA. During my SSB at Bhopal, my swimming background and knowledge of ships and naval ranks came in handy. In the GTO tasks, I volunteered to go first for the obstacle course and completed all 10 obstacles within the 3-minute limit. In the personal interview, the Deputy President asked me about Indian Navy ships, submarine fleets, and geopolitical conflicts in the Indian Ocean region. Reading current affairs magazines and having a genuine interest in the Navy made the difference. Work hard, stay focused!
